name: smoke tile for monchique validation AOI

properties.name: smoke tile — Serra de Monchique / Monchique town (~37.322°N, 8.540°W)
properties.description:
~1 km × 1 km smoke tile centred on Monchique town (37.322°N, 8.540°W), the highest-density infrastructure sub-tile inside the monchique validation AOI and the area most directly threatened by the 2018 WUI fire. Tile is a best-effort pick pending full scripts/pick_smoke_tile.py validation against OSM (power_tower≥1 AND building≥1 AND highway≥1 AND intersects ICNF burn).
